operational_knowledge_units.title: RobotCommandDatabaseModel tracks requested AGV robot command status
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that the RobotCommandDatabaseModel table tracks the status of robot commands requested by the robotics module for AGVs.
observed_evidence: Slide text: 'The RobotCommandDatabaseModel table tracks the status of the robot commands requested by the robotics module for AGVs.'
Slide title: 'Robotics Database / Robot Command Database Model'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: RobotCommandDatabaseModel is a robotics database table that tracks status of robot commands requested by the robotics module for AGVs.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Robot command names represented in RobotCommandDatabaseModel
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide enumerates robot command names whose status is tracked in the RobotCommandDatabaseModel table.
observed_evidence: Command list shown on slide under 'Command Names'

Visible commands include: EmptyGoTo, PickupTote, MoveTote, DropOffTote, InductTote, RemoveTote, ReleaseAgv, InitializeAgv, RecoverAgv, SystemRecover, SystemStop, RemoveAgv, UpdateBox, GetInventoryToteLocation, GetChargersStatus, GoCharge, CancelRequest
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: RobotCommandDatabaseModel command names include EmptyGoTo, PickupTote, MoveTote, DropOffTote, InductTote, RemoveTote, ReleaseAgv, InitializeAgv, RecoverAgv, SystemRecover, SystemStop, RemoveAgv, UpdateBox, GetInventoryToteLocation, GetChargersStatus, GoCharge, and CancelRequest.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Completed robot commands are archived to RobotCommandActivity
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that when commands are complete, they are archived to RobotCommandActivity.
observed_evidence: Slide text: 'When Commands are complete. They are archived to RobotCommandActivity'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Completed robot commands are archived from the active robot command tracking model to RobotCommandActivity when the commands are complete.
